历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai University in Chongqing Physics Category were approximately 8218 → 7911 → 10429 → 10464 → 11125, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2022, there was a slight forward shift, but in 2023, it significantly moved back to 10429, remained roughly stable in 2024, and continued to move back to 11125 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2900 positions over the past 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11125. The enrollment plan for Shanghai University in Chongqing Physics Category: 45 students in 2021 → 43 in 2022 → 42 in 2023 → 39 in 2024 → 39 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend. The planned enrollment for 2026 is 41 students, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025, an expansion of about 5.1%, which provides some relief to competition pressure.
3. [University Level] Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 43rd in 2021 → 46th in 2022 → 48th in 2023 → 56th in 2024 → 61st in 2025 → 60th in 2026. In recent years, the ranking has slightly declined but rebounded in 2026, overall remaining in the top 60 nationally, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Shanghai University's reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean's paper fabrication reported, teacher data forgery, etc.), with 6 out of 7 incidents being negative, which may have some inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 48th, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot', comprehensive popularity of about 816,000, which is at an upper-middle level among 211 universities, with moderate short video exposure. There are no obvious signs of admission gaps in historical admission anomaly records for Shanghai University. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shanghai University's Sociology was rated A, and World History was rated A-, representing its representative advantageous disciplines. The Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (including Sociology, Law, etc.) corresponding to Sociology is a History Category enrollment major; although World History does not directly correspond to Physics Category enrollment majors, it reflects the university's humanities and social sciences foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Electronic Information/Communication categories are 'highly recommended', Electrical Engineering and Automation is 'highly recommended', and Computer Science is 'recommended'. These popular engineering majors are highly related to Shanghai University's Physics Category enrollment in Chongqing, including Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, and Science Experimental Class, which helps attract high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing general college entrance examination is about 209,000 (no subject-specific data), estimated at about 138,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 66%, a slight decrease of about 1.1% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 139,500, indicating a slight easing of competition pressure. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Chongqing candidates. In 2021, the university enrolled 51 students in Chongqing (about 1.84% of total national enrollment), but the overall cross-province enrollment scale is stable. As a first-tier city, Shanghai has strong appeal to candidates, but cross-province applications inherently have some regional preference differences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11125, the 2026 Physics Category enrollment expansion of 2 students (+5.1%), a slight decrease of about 1.1% in total candidates, the possibility that negative reputation incidents may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the continuous attraction of high-scoring candidates by popular majors such as Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering, and taking into account the slight easing of competition due to fewer candidates and negative reputation, the adjusted predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11417, with a range of 10917–11917.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10917–11917, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electrical Engineering and Science Experimental Class as the main choices, with Tier 1 Electronic Information as a reach target, and Tier 3 Economics as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10500), you can focus on reaching for the Tier 1 Electronic Information (Future Technology College) flagship major.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai University in Chongqing's History Category were approximately 1192 → 1439 → 1537 → 1992 → 1953, showing an overall continuous backward trend. From 2021 to 2024, it moved backward year by year, accumulating a backward shift of about 800 places. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's History Category: 2021: 6 students → 2022: 6 → 2023: 5 → 2024: 5 → 2025: 5. The 2026 plan remains 5 students, stable for 4 consecutive years, with a steady enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 60th, placing it among the top 60 nationwide. For History Category students, it is a high-quality choice within the 211 tier. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Shanghai University's reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some students' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 48th, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot,' and a comprehensive popularity of about 816,000, which is above average among 211 universities. There are no obvious signs of a cutoff drop in historical History Category admission records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Shanghai University's Sociology was rated A, and World History was rated A-. Sociology directly corresponds to the Humanities Science Experimental Class (including Sociology, Social Work, Law, etc.) enrollment major, providing strong disciplinary support for History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Law is 'differentiated and wait-and-see' (slightly recommended), Teacher Training/Education is 'differentiated and wait-and-see,' and Chinese Language/Literature is 'recommended.' The total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing general college entrance examination is about 209,000. Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 34%, it is estimated to be about 71,000, a slight decrease of about 3.2% compared to the 2025 History Category of 73,400, indicating a slight easing of competition pressure. Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, which is a cross-province application for Chongqing History Category students. As a first-tier city, Shanghai has a strong appeal to liberal arts students, but cross-province applications have certain regional preference differences. The enrollment scale for this university's History Category is extremely small (only 5 students), meaning that ranking fluctuations may be relatively large.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1953, the 2026 History Category enrollment plan unchanged (5 students), a slight decrease in total candidates of about 3.2%, the negative reputation incident possibly suppressing some application enthusiasm, and the sustained attraction of the Sociology A discipline to students, and taking into account the slight easing of competition due to fewer candidates and negative reputation, the adjusted predicted minimum ranking is about 1923, with a range of 1577–2269.
